SHORT NAME: BNFTPHAS 

LONG NAME: BENEFIT_PHASE 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: PDE (derived) 

VALUES: Null/blank = Not a covered drug 
CC = PDE occurred in catastrophic 
phase 
DC = PDE straddled deductible and 
catastrophic phases 
DD = PDE occurred in deductible phase 
DI = PDE straddled deductible and ICL 
(coverage gap) phases 
DP = PDE straddled deductible and 
pre-ICL phases 
IC = PDE straddled ICL (coverage gap) 
and catastrophic phases
